subcodes.first_line: O ye who are devoted to the Beauty of the All-Glorious! The bounties and favors of His divine Unity are befitting unto you, and rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فدائیان روی بهاء حضرت احدیت الطاف و عنایتی هر جهتچه سزه شایان بیوروب انوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
